title: 前沿企业如何拉开差距
title_en: How frontier firms are pulling ahead
summary: OpenAI的B2B Signals研究揭示了前沿企业如何深化AI应用，扩展基于Codex的智能体工作流，并构建持久的竞争优势。该报告展示了企业通过大规模部署AI代理和自动化流程来提升效率与创新能力。OpenAI's B2B Signals research reveals how frontier enterprises deepen AI adoption, scale Codex-powered agentic workflows, and build durable competitive advantage, demonstrating how companies enhance efficiency and innovation through large-scale deployment of AI agents and automated processes.
